name.title: Name your workspace
name.description: Workspaces keep your agents organized, one for personal, one for work, etc.

provider.title: Connect your AI
provider.description: Houston uses <emph>your own</emph> subscription. We never see your credentials.

welcome.title: Welcome to Houston
welcome.tagline: Houston is where you build Agents that work with the same tools you use to work.
welcome.stepsTitle: The tutorial will guide you to create your first agent by:

steps.brain: Connect an AI provider so it can think
steps.try: Try a real mission with your assistant
steps.skill: Save it as a reusable Skill
steps.routine: Schedule it as a recurring Routine

defaults.focus: Help me stay organized, prepare my day, draft messages, protect focus time, and keep track of follow-ups.
defaults.approvalRule: Ask before sending messages, creating calendar events, or changing anything in connected apps.
defaults.firstWorkflow: Set up my first useful daily workflow

meet.title: Meet your assistant
meet.body: Give your assistant a name and a color. You can change them later.

brain.title: Give it a brain
brain.body: Your assistant needs an AI provider to think and write. Houston uses your own subscription.
brain.continueHint: Houston will create your assistant and open the next mission.

tools.title: Give it your own tools
tools.body: Houston connects to your mail, calendar and 1000+ apps through your integrations provider. We use Composio by default. Sign in once so your assistant can actually do work with your real apps.
tools.cardBody: Sign in to let your assistant use your apps. Default provider: Composio.
tools.cardSignedInBody: Your assistant can now use your apps
tools.continueHint: Your assistant will ask for each app the first time it needs it.

try.title: Try a real mission

intro.title: Work with your first agent
intro.body: In Houston, your agents connect to your real tools to actually do work for you.

try.doneTitle: You did it. First mission complete.

skill.title: Plan my next working day
skill.description: Read your calendar and inbox in parallel, cross-reference them for things you'd miss, and post a structured plan with what's urgent, your agenda and what to reply.

skill.title: Save this as a Skill

intro.title: Save it as a Skill
intro.body: If you want to run this same flow again later, save it as a Skill. Your assistant can reuse it with one click, or whenever you ask.

skill.savedDescription: Plan the next working day by cross-referencing inbox and calendar, with a draft reply for the top email worth answering.
skill.savedMessage: Saved as a Skill called **{{slug}}**. You can run it anytime, with one click or by asking me.

done.title: Saved as a Skill
done.subtitle: Now you can run this anytime, with one click or by asking.

intro.title: Make it a Routine
intro.body: If you want this to run automatically on a schedule, save it as a Routine. Your assistant runs it in the background and shows you the result.

done.title: Your Routine is ready
done.subtitle: Houston will run this automatically on the schedule you picked.
done.manualHint: You can also create routines yourself from the Routines tab, or just ask any agent.

summary.title: Your assistant is ready
summary.body: Here is everything you just set up. You can change any of it later from the Skills or Routines tab, or just ask your assistant.
